description: A plain nighttime candid/evidence photograph with no design overlay or on-image text. Shot from above into an opened compartment of a utility truck (the diamond-plate bed rail and a gas strut/hinge are visible at top), it shows a man in a gray hooded jacket and blue jeans climbing or being pulled out of a cramped hidden compartment; he holds a phone in one hand and his face is blurred/pixelated. A flashlight beam streaks across his leg, and stowed clothing/bags (yellow and camouflage items) are visible in the dark interior. This corresponds to the tweet about eight illegal aliens found locked inside hidden compartments of a utility truck during an ICE San Antonio smuggling interdiction in Dimmit County, Texas. It is a documentary enforcement photo with no agency branding, slogans, or graphic styling.
